events.content: Implemented browser primitive as a nested workspace package: Implemented browser primitive as a nested workspace package

raw.question: Implemented browser primitive as a nested workspace package
raw.chosen: Implemented browser primitive as a nested workspace package
raw.reasoning: The design document defines packages/primitives/browser as an independent primitive, so the implementation needs package metadata, a workspace entry, and package build coverage in addition to source files.

retrospective.summary: Implemented Browser primitive client with typed actions, Playwright-backed BrowserClient, action modules, package workspace wiring, and build/lint verification.
